system.description:
With the power of thunder smash your foes across the battlefield, and with the swiftness of lightning you dash after them to strike them dead.

LEVEL 3

Harbinger of the Storm. Gain an aura with a Reach of 4. (1/Encounter) After you Interpose, deal lightning damage equal to your Judgment Dice to all enemies within your aura.

LEVEL 7

Thunderous Strike. (1/Encounter) When you use Condemning Strike, knock your target Prone and push them (Large: STR spaces, Med or smaller: 2x STR spaces). Other creatures hit this way are knocked Prone and pushed as well.

LEVEL 11

Thunderous Judgment. (1/Mana) Exchange places with an ally outside your aura that is being attacked (this counts as Interposing) and refresh your Harbinger of the Storm or Thunderous Strike.

LEVEL 15

Stormstrike. (1/Safe Rest) Reaction: When an ally you can see would gain a Wound. Exchange place with them, maximize your Judgment Dice and deal that much lightning damage to all enemies within your aura.
